steps: Let s = seeds planted on Monday. On Tuesday, 12 more seeds planted, so total seeds planted = s + 12. By Friday, 5 seeds have not grown, so growing plants = total seeds planted − seeds not grown = (s + 12) − 5. The problem says she now has 25 growing plants, so equation: s + 12 − 5 = 25. Simplify: s + 7 = 25 → s = 18. Check options: A says s + 12 − 5 = 25, so s = 18 → matches. D says same equation but s = 20 → wrong. E says same equation but s = 15 → wrong. B and C have different equations. Only A matches the correct equation and correct solution.
